action_set_definitions.name: list_conflicted_files
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of file paths that currently contain merge conflicts.

action_set_definitions.name: read_file_content
action_set_definitions.description: Reads the full content of a specific file, including any merge conflict markers.

file_path.description: The path to the file to be read.

example_output.content:
def process():
<<<<<<< HEAD
    verify_kyc()
=======
    route_credit()
>>>>>>> credit-expansion

action_set_definitions.name: update_file_content
action_set_definitions.description: Overwrites the content of a file. Use this to save the resolved version of a conflicted file without markers.

file_path.description: The path to the file to be updated.

content.description: The new content for the file, with conflict markers removed and logic integrated.

action_set_definitions.name: stage_file
action_set_definitions.description: Stages a file (equivalent to 'git add') to mark the conflict as resolved in the git index.

file_path.description: The path to the file to stage.

state_description.files: A map of file paths to their current string content, including conflict markers if applicable.
state_description.conflicted_paths: A list of file paths that currently contain unresolved merge conflicts.
state_description.current_branch: The name of the branch currently checked out (e.g., 'main').
state_description.merging_branch: The name of the branch being merged that caused the conflict.
state_description.staged_files: List of files that have been staged (git add) for the merge commit.
